response.overview: In a rundown flat two eccentric women spend their days bickering. They are hungry, they have a newborn baby that screams constantly and they are starved of company. But today that is going to change. Today they have company. A pair of over zealous preachers who plan to offer salvation to the women whether they like it or not. But the preachers are about to find out that not all souls want to be saved.
response.title: Cold Call
